headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Tractor Supply, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Oliver Wintermantel   maintains Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $45 to $40.
